---
title: "Marcus Harris"
subtitle: "Psychometrics • Meta-Research • Measurement"
---

I build tools and theories for reliable measurement in psychology and education. My work focuses on psychometric modeling, meta-research, and open, reproducible methods.

**Research Focus**
- Measurement invariance and fairness
- Meta-analytic methods and bias detection
- Bayesian and multilevel psychometrics

**Current Work**
- Developing simulation tools for power and reliability in scale validation
- Auditing common practices in scale development across subfields
- Building open teaching materials for measurement theory

**Contact**
- Email: marcus@example.com
- GitHub: github.com/your-username
- Google Scholar: scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_ID
